This is a tough test for the Lakers, so the hope […]

articles.title: Joel Farabee scores 2 goals as Flames edge Hurricanes 5-4
articles.original_title: Joel Farabee scores 2 goals as Flames edge Hurricanes 5-4
articles.summary: Joel Farabee scored twice and had an assist to lead the Calgary Flames to a 5-4 victory over the Carolina Hurricanes on Saturday night.  Morgan Frost had a goal and two assists for the Flames, who snapped a four-game winless skid.  Ryan Strome had a goal and an assist in his debut for Calgary, and Blake Coleman also had a goal and an assist.

articles.title: Horvat scores winner in OT as Islanders edge Sharks 2-1
articles.original_title: Horvat scores winner in OT as Islanders edge Sharks 2-1
articles.summary: Bo Horvat scored with 39.6 seconds left in overtime, lifting the New York Islanders to a 2-1 win over the San Jose Sharks on Saturday night.  Tony DeAngelo also had a goal and Ilya Sorokin made 30 saves for New York, which snapped a two-game skid and improved to 9-0 this season in overtime.  It was also the Islanders' second win over the Sharks this season.

articles.title: Senators pull away with 4-goal spree, beat Kraken 7-4
articles.original_title: Senators pull away with 4-goal spree, beat Kraken 7-4
articles.summary: SEATTLE (AP) — Shane Pinto had a goal and two assists in Ottawa's four-goal spree in the first and second periods and the Senators beat the Seattle Kraken 7-4 on Saturday night.Linus Ulmark made 17 saves to help Ottawa improve to 3-1 on a five-game trip. The Senators are four points behind Boston for the final wild-card spot in the Eastern Conference.Seattle has lost two in a row and four of its past six. It holds the second wild card in the West after San Jose’s overtime loss to the New York Is

articles.title: Wright scores 23 in 2nd half as BYU rallies for 82-76 win over No. 10 Texas Tech
articles.original_title: Wright scores 23 in 2nd half as BYU rallies for 82-76 win over No. 10 Texas Tech
articles.summary: Robert Wright III scored 23 of his 27 points in the second half, rallying BYU to an 82-76 victory over No. 10 Texas Tech on Saturday night.  Wright made his first seven shots after halftime to help the Cougars (21-10, 9-9 Big 12) snap a three-game losing streak and beat a top-10 opponent at home for the second time this season.  AJ Dybantsa added 21 points, six rebounds and four assists for BYU.

articles.title: Porzingis, back from illness, 'will be healthy now'
articles.original_title: Porzingis, back from illness, 'will be healthy now'
articles.summary: Kristaps Porzingis, playing in just his second game for the Warriors after recovering from another bout of illness, says he feels he's feeling healthy and ready to play consistently again.

articles.title: Celts' Tatum calls 15-point return 'really good step'
articles.original_title: Celts' Tatum calls 15-point return 'really good step'
articles.summary: Celtics star Jayson Tatum said he felt anxious in his first game in 298 days but was able to relax and finished with 15 points, 12 rebounds and seven assists in a 120-100 win over the Mavericks.

articles.title: Exhausted Wemby emotional after 25-point rally
articles.original_title: Exhausted Wemby emotional after 25-point rally
articles.summary: Victor Wembanyama said he had "zero left" physically but was all smiles after the Spurs overcame a 25-point deficit to stun the Clippers 116-112.

articles.title: Celtics' Vucevic has surgery on fractured finger
articles.original_title: Celtics' Vucevic has surgery on fractured finger
articles.summary: Celtics center Nikola Vucevic underwent surgery to repair a fractured ring finger on his right hand and will be reevaluated in three to four weeks, the team announced.

articles.summary: The Lakers will be without LeBron James and two of their big men in Deandre Ayton and Maxi Kleber on Friday against the Pacers, the team announced.
